Notes: Big second half propels Red Hawks to non-league victory.  Sophomore Kaitlyn
Saunders led RPI with 15 points, including 11 in the second half, 7 rebounds
and 4 steals.  Swarthmore's Zoey Adams-Deutsch led the Garnet Tide with 14
